  · exact isStoppingTime_hittingAfter_mono hX1 hX2 (Set.Ici n) (Set.Ici (n + 1)) (by simp) bot_le
  · intro ω
    have : ∃ t, X t ω ≥ n := by
      obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := exists_ge_norm_of_tendsto_atTop (hX2 ω) n
      exact ⟨t, ht⟩
    exact (hittingAfter_mem_iff hX2 _ _).mpr this
  · exact (isStoppingTime_hittingAfter hX1 hX2 (Set.Ici n) (by simp)).ae_stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue
      (hX1.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2)

by
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
  · exact isStoppingTime_hittingAfter hX1 hX2 h𝓕 (Set.Ici n) measurableSet_Ici
  · exact fun ω ↦ ne_of_lt (WithTop.coe_lt_top _)
  · exact fun ω ↦ le_rfl
  · filter_upwards
    intro ω
    have : ∃ t, X t ω ≥ n := by
      obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := exists_ge_norm_of_tendsto_atTop (hX2 ω) atTop_neBot
      use t
      simpa using ht
    simp only [hittingAfter, Set.mem_Ici, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    exact this

by
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
  · exact isStoppingTime_hittingAfter hX1 hX2 (Set.Ici n) (by simp)
  · exact fun ω ↦ ne_of_lt (WithTop.coe_lt_top _)
  · exact fun ω ↦ le_rfl
  · filter_upwards
    intro ω
    have : Tendsto (X · ω) atTop atTop := tendsto_atTop_atTop_of_rightContinuous hX2 ω
    obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := this.eventually (Filter.eventually_ge_atTop n)
    refine ⟨t, ?_⟩
    simp only [hittingAfter_apply, Set.mem_Ici, ge_iff_le]
    exact ⟨ht, bot_le⟩

by
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact isStoppingTime_hittingAfter hX1 hX2 (Set.Ici n) (by simp)
  · intro ω
    apply lt_of_le_of_ne
    · exact le_top
    · intro h
      simp only [WithTop.eq_top_iff_forall_gt] at h
      specialize h (n + 1)
      simp only [Set.mem_Ici, Nat.cast_le] at h
      linarith
  · intro m n hmn ω
    apply hittingAfter_mono_left
    · exact Set.Ici_subset_Ici.mpr (Nat.cast_le.mpr hmn)
    · exact bot_le
  · filter_upwards
    intro ω
    have : ∃ t, X t ω ≥ ↑n := by
      use n
      simp
    exact (tendsto_hittingAfter_atTop hX2 this).eventually (Filter.eventually_ge_atTop n)

by
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
  · exact isStoppingTime_hittingAfter hX1 hX2 h𝓕 (Set.Ici n) bot_mem_Ici
  · exact (isStoppingTime_hittingAfter hX1 hX2 h𝓕 (Set.Ici n) bot_mem_Ici).mono
      (by simp [le_refl])
  · exact fun _ _ h => le_trans h (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr (le_of_lt (Nat.cast_lt.mpr (Nat.lt_succ_self n))))
  · filter_upwards with ω
    have : Tendsto (fun n ↦ (hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) ⊥) ω) atTop (nhds ⊤) := by
      apply tendsto_atTop_nhds
      intro t
      obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := exists_nat_gt (t : ℝ)
      use N
      intro n hn
      simp only [hittingAfter, Set.mem_Ici, ge_iff_le]
      apply le_of_not_lt
      intro h
      exact (lt_irrefl ↑N) (lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.le_of_lt hn)) hN)
    simpa using this
